title: Mn‐Rich MnSb<sub>2</sub>Te<sub>4</sub>: A Topological Insulator with Magnetic Gap Closing at High Curie Temperatures of 45–50 K
classification_notes: GPT error: Unterminated string starting at: line 184 column 24 (char 12148)

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports that slightly Mn-rich MnSb2Te4 becomes a ferromagnetic topological insulator with a high Curie temperature and a magnetically driven bandgap closing near the transition.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The available information does not specify any accessible dataset, source data, or supplementary data files for this paper.

dataset_characterization.data_organization: No data availability statement was found on the publisher page, and no downloadable data files or external repository links were identified.
